content:
That’s amazing to hear—this is exactly what we hope for. Whether someone is drawn in at first by the gameplay, the story, or our unique art style, we hope they’ll eventually fall in love with the whole game.

I’m really happy you’re enjoying it!

And thank you—we’ll take care of our health. Please take care of yours, too!
Oh my I really didn’t expect you to give a personally reply to all of us lol. Thank you so much and take care Light!
